api_key.description: Salesloft API key, sent as a Bearer token. Takes precedence over OAuth2 credentials when both are configured (matches legacy's authenticator selection order).

access_token.description: A Salesloft OAuth2 access token. Used directly as a Bearer token when no api_key is set and no refresh_token+client_id+client_secret triple is configured. When a refresh_token triple IS also configured, this value seeds the OAuth hook's cache and is honored once before any refresh network call (matches legacy's seedToken behavior).

refresh_token.description: Long-lived Salesloft OAuth2 refresh token. Exchanged for a short-lived access token at token_url (grant_type=refresh_token) when client_id/client_secret are also configured and no api_key is set.

client_id.description: Salesloft OAuth2 client ID, used only in the refresh-token-grant token request form.

client_secret.description: Salesloft OAuth2 client secret, used only in the refresh-token-grant token request form.

base_url.description: Salesloft REST API v2 base URL override for tests or proxies.

token_url.description: Salesloft OAuth2 token endpoint override. MUST be http(s) with a host; the hook fails closed on an invalid value to prevent exfiltrating the refresh token/client secret to an attacker-chosen endpoint.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only objects updated at or after this time are read, on a fresh sync with no persisted cursor.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
